column1: # Langstone Harbour UKHO half-hourly tide data
# 9 days from 14 April 2026 to 22 April 2026 inclusive.
# Provided by user via chat. Used for tidal-curve refinement.
#   This dataset covers a complete neaps -> springs -> neaps cycle:
#   The tide-range variation across the 9 days is exactly what curve
#   calibration needs - the asymmetric stand behaviour can vary between
#   springs and neaps and a single-week snapshot cannot reveal that.
# HW/LW summary lines are absent in this dataset (only half-hourly
# samples were provided). The analysis script will derive them from
# the half-hourly data via local-extremum detection where needed.
